fieldUpdates.description: Sets the Travel Request status to Pending Approval when submitted for approval.
fieldUpdates.name: Set Status to Pending Approval

fieldUpdates.description: Sets the Travel Request status to Approved when all approval steps are completed.
fieldUpdates.name: Set Status to Approved

fieldUpdates.description: Sets the Travel Request status to Rejected when the approval request is rejected.
fieldUpdates.name: Set Status to Rejected
